title: User Datagram Protocol (UDP)
overview: UDP is a connectionless, lightweight transport‑layer protocol (Layer 4) that delivers datagrams with minimal overhead. It sacrifices reliability for speed and simplicity—there’s no handshake, no sequencing, and no built‑in retransmission.
